comment.body: Check yields. Bonds don't take this shit. You can already see early tariff pass-through in core goods. It's started. Our Lady predicted this in may. Services ex-energy are still sticky. Businesses have eaten most of the tariff hit so far, but we expect the consumer share to rise in coming months as firms reprice. Powell’s presser said they’ll wait for the next two rounds of jobs + inflation before deciding. An “insurance” cut with hawkish guidance is on the table, but that'd not be bullish
comment.raw_body: Check yields. Bonds don't take this shit. You can already see early tariff pass-through in core goods. It's started. Our Lady predicted this in may.
